<think>The user wants me to classify the sentiment of the text "I love this product, it changed my life!" as either "positive" or "negative".

This text clearly expresses positive sentiment:
- "I love" indicates strong positive emotion
- "changed my life" suggests a transformative, very positive experience
- The exclamation mark shows enthusiasm

The answer is clearly "positive".
</think>

positive

</think>
